name: class_array_to_singular_length_one
description: M3d CLAIMED: a class field (Pair{a:int,b:string}) with a LENGTH-ONE ARRAY [{"a":1,"b":"x"}]. coerce_class routes the Array through coerce_array_to_singular over the items (each coerced into the class) -> Pair{a:1,b:x} + FirstMatch. want live-captured from BAML final parse.
